content.content: Please check the rating of the shoes I bought today. If the rating is lower than 4.0, please request a refund.

This involves executing the `view_order_history` function. After retrieving the order history, I will examine the rating of the shoes and proceed with a refund request if the rating is lower than 4.0. 
</function_thought>
